source_title: Aviation Investigation Preliminary Report - DCA26MA024 (UPS Flight 2976, McDonnell Douglas MD-11F, N259UP, Louisville, KY)
notes: Preliminary report; pages repeatedly stamped 'This information is preliminary and subject to change'. Pressure points: temporal extraction (multiple EST timestamps), numeric/unit extraction (cycles, hours, altitudes, weather), conflicting altitude reporting (FDR vs ADS-B), preliminary-status caveats, source-attribution to specific parties (FAA, Boeing, UPS, IPA, GE, Teamsters), and absence of probable cause. Original was a PDF on www.ntsb.gov; egress proxy blocked direct PDF download, so source_original.txt is the verbatim text extracted via web_fetch on 2026-05-23. The companion NTSB investigation page is https://www.ntsb.gov/investigations/Pages/DCA26MA024.aspx.
